new_documents.summary: FEMA reporting deadline for foreign transactions extended by 30 days.

new_documents.summary: Invoice Management System mandatory from April 1, 2026 for all GST filers.

new_documents.title: CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27
new_documents.summary: TDS rates revised for Section 194C and 194J effective April 2026.

new_documents.summary: LLP Form 11 annual return due date extended to July 15, 2026.

new_documents.title: SEBI Circular: ESG Disclosure Norms for Listed Companies
new_documents.summary: Enhanced ESG disclosures mandatory for top 1000 listed companies.

new_documents.title: RBI Directions: NBFC Governance and KYC Compliance - 2026
new_documents.summary: RBI issues updated directions on NBFC internal governance, KYC norms, and monthly return filing.

new_documents.title: CBDT Circular: Presumptive Taxation under Section 44ADA for Professionals - FY 2026-27
new_documents.summary: CBDT clarifies applicability of presumptive taxation scheme under Section 44ADA for freelancers and professionals.

new_documents.title: CBDT Circular: DTAA Relief for NRI Rental Income and TDS Refund Claims - FY 2026-27
new_documents.summary: CBDT guidance on DTAA benefit claims for NRI rental income and excess TDS deducted by tenants under Section 195.

new_documents.title: CBDT Circular: Capital Gains on Debt Mutual Fund Redemptions - AY 2026-27
new_documents.summary: CBDT clarifies capital gains computation for debt mutual fund redemptions and STT applicability for AY 2026-27.

new_documents.title: EPFO Circular: ECR Filing Mandate and Wage Ceiling Update - 2026
new_documents.summary: EPFO mandates monthly ECR filing and updates PF wage ceiling for covered establishments with 20 or more employees.

drafts.circular_title: RBI Circular: FEMA Compliance Deadline Extended - March 2026
drafts.circular_summary: FEMA reporting deadline for foreign transactions extended by 30 days.
actions: Submit SOFTEX form for each export invoice to the bank within 30 days — required as Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is a software exporter under FEMA
Reconcile shipping documents, invoices, bank realisation details, and SOFTEX declarations before closure of the reporting cycle
Obtain corrected declarations where transaction values, invoice references, or remittance details do not match prior submissions
drafts.email_subject: Compliance Advisory: RBI Circular: FEMA Compliance Deadline Extended - March 2026
drafts.email_body:
{
  "subject": "FEMA Compliance Advisory for Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd.",
  "body": "Dear Mr. Kapoor,

As a software exporter under the Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA), Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is required to comply with the RBI Circular: FEMA Compliance Deadline Extended - March 2026. This circular mandates specific actions to ensure accurate reporting and compliance with FEMA regulations.

To ensure compliance, we recommend the following actions:

1. Submit SOFTEX form for each export invoice to the bank within 30 days of the invoice date.
2. Reconcile shipping documents, invoices, bank realisation details, and SOFTEX declarations before the closure of the reporting cycle.
3. Obtain corrected declarations where transaction values, invoice references, or remittance details do not match prior submissions.

The deadline for completing these actions is **28th April 2026**. Please note that failure to comply may result in penalties, although the specific penalty is not specified in the circular.

If you require any assistance or clarification on these requirements, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team

Source Reference:
Circular Title : RBI Circular: FEMA Compliance Deadline Extended - March 2026
Regulator      : RBI
Circular No.   : Refer official portal
Published Date : Recent
Source URL     : https://www.rbi.org.in/sample/fema_circular_march2026.pdf
"
drafts.internal_notes: CA notes — deadline was estimated, cross-checks needed for related party transactions with Kapoor Tech Inc., Delaware USA

actions: Submit SOFTEX form for each export invoice to the bank within 30 days — required as Arvind Textiles is a goods exporter under FEMA
Reconcile shipping documents, invoices, bank realisation details, and SOFTEX declarations before closure of the reporting cycle
Obtain corrected declarations where transaction values, invoice references, or remittance details do not match prior submissions
drafts.email_subject: Compliance Advisory: RBI Circular: FEMA Compliance Deadline Extended - March 2026
drafts.email_body:
{
  "subject": "FEMA Compliance Advisory - Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd.",
  "body": "Dear Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd.,

As a goods exporter under the Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA), Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd. is required to comply with the RBI's FEMA regulations. This advisory is to inform you of the recent extension of the compliance deadline.

To ensure compliance, we recommend the following actions:

1. Submit SOFTEX form for each export invoice to the bank within 30 days of the export transaction.
2. Reconcile shipping documents, invoices, bank realisation details, and SOFTEX declarations before the closure of the reporting cycle.
3. Obtain corrected declarations where transaction values, invoice references, or remittance details do not match prior submissions.

The deadline for completing these actions is **28th April 2026**. Please note that non-compliance may attract penalties, although the risk level is classified as medium.

If you require any assistance or clarification on the above, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team

Source Reference:
Circular Title : RBI Circular: FEMA Compliance Deadline Extended - March 2026
Regulator      : RBI
Circular No.   : Refer official portal
Published Date : Recent
Source URL     : https://www.rbi.org.in/sample/fema_circular_march2026.pdf"
}
drafts.internal_notes: CA notes — deadline was estimated, cross-checks needed for related party transactions with Arvind Global FZE (UAE)

drafts.circular_title: RBI Circular: FEMA Compliance Deadline Extended - March 2026
drafts.circular_summary: FEMA reporting deadline for foreign transactions extended by 30 days.
actions: Submit SOFTEX form for each export invoice to the bank within 30 days — required as Sunrise Finserv NBFC Ltd. is a registered NBFC
File RBI monthly return (NBS-9) by the 7th of each month — Sunrise Finserv NBFC Ltd. is a Public Limited Company and RBI-registered NBFC
Update KYC records for all borrowers and depositors at the prescribed periodicity — Sunrise Finserv NBFC Ltd. is a Public Limited Company and RBI-registered NBFC
drafts.email_subject: Compliance Advisory: RBI Circular: FEMA Compliance Deadline Extended - March 2026
drafts.email_body:
{
  "subject": "FEMA Compliance Advisory for Sunrise Finserv NBFC Ltd.",
  "body": "Dear Mr. [Last Name],

As a registered Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC) and a Public Limited Company, Sunrise Finserv NBFC Ltd. is required to comply with the RBI's FEMA regulations. This advisory is to bring to your attention the necessary actions required to be taken by your organization.

Please find below the required actions to be taken by your organization:

1. Submit SOFTEX form for each export invoice to the bank within 30 days.
2. File RBI monthly return (NBS-9) by the 7th of each month.
3. Update KYC records for all borrowers and depositors at the prescribed periodicity.

The deadline for completing these actions is **28th April 2026**. Please note that failure to comply may result in regulatory penalties.

If you require any assistance or clarification on these requirements, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team

Source Reference:
Circular Title : RBI Circular: FEMA Compliance Deadline Extended - March 2026
Regulator      : RBI
Circular No.   : Refer official portal
Published Date : Recent
Source URL     : https://www.rbi.org.in/sample/fema_circular_march2026.pdf
" }
drafts.internal_notes: CA notes — deadline was estimated, cross-checks needed for RBI compliance action — license risk

drafts.circular_title: RBI Circular: FEMA Compliance Deadline Extended - March 2026
drafts.circular_summary: FEMA reporting deadline for foreign transactions extended by 30 days.
actions: Submit SOFTEX form for each export invoice to the bank within 30 days — required as Priya Nair is a NRI resident in Dubai since 2019 and has rental income ₹2.4L from Worli flat
Reconcile shipping documents, invoices, bank realisation details, and SOFTEX declarations before closure of the reporting cycle
drafts.email_subject: Compliance Advisory: RBI Circular: FEMA Compliance Deadline Extended - March 2026
drafts.email_body:
{
  "subject": "FEMA Compliance Advisory: RBI Circular - Deadline Extension",
  "body": "Dear Priya Nair,

We have been made aware that you are a Non-Resident Indian (NRI) resident in Dubai since 2019 and have rental income of ₹2.4L from a flat in Worli. As such, you are required to comply with the RBI's FEMA regulations.

To ensure compliance, we recommend the following actions:

1. Submit SOFTEX form for each export invoice to the bank within 30 days of the export transaction.
2. Reconcile shipping documents, invoices, bank realisation details, and SOFTEX declarations before the closure of the reporting cycle.

The deadline for completing these actions is **28th April 2026**. Please note that failure to comply may result in penalties, although the specific penalty amount is not specified in the circular.

If you require any assistance with these actions or have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team

Source Reference:
Circular Title : RBI Circular: FEMA Compliance Deadline Extended - March 2026
Regulator      : RBI
Source URL     : https://www.rbi.org.in/sample/fema_circular_march2026.pdf
"
drafts.internal_notes: CA notes — deadline was estimated, cross-checks needed for client-specific considerations
